name: Company Info Agent Evaluation
description: Test cases for the agent improvement cycle demo. Covers happy paths and intentional v1 flaws.

eval_cases.question: How many PTO days do I get per year?
Can I carry over unused vacation days to next year?
How many sick days do I have?
How many days can I work from home?
What is the meal reimbursement limit for business travel?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 prompt has no expense info, agent will be unhelpful or hallucinate

eval_cases.question: Do I need receipts for a $30 lunch during a work trip?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 prompt has no expense info

eval_cases.question: What health insurance plans does the company offer?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 prompt says 'competitive benefits' with no specifics, will hallucinate

eval_cases.question: Does the company match 401k contributions?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 prompt has no 401k details, will hallucinate

eval_cases.question: I want to take next Friday off. How do I request PTO?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 has no date handling, may ask for clarification

eval_cases.question: How long is the parental leave policy?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 prompt has no parental leave details
